title: Ubiquiti UXG-Pro-EU, UniFi Next-generation Gateway Pro
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Routers and Firewalls
description: The UniFi Next-generation Gateway Pro (UXG Pro) is a powerful security gateway that delivers a versatile networking interface and enterprise-class threat management functionality to medium to large-sized networks. The UXG Pro is equipped with (2) WAN ports (GbE RJ45 and 10G SFP+) that provide failover support, as well as (2) LAN ports (GbE RJ45 and 10G SFP+) to provide the high-speed connectivity needed to support the most bandwidth-intensive applications. It also excels as a complete network… 1.7 GHz quad-core processor (2) WAN ports (GbE RJ45 and 10G SFP+) with failover support (2) LAN ports (GbE RJ45 and 10G SFP+) Power redundancy when connected to the UniFi SmartPower RPS (sold separately) SmartPower outlet (200~240VAC/1,25A) for an external modem 1U-sized, rack-mountable device Enterprise-class DPI, IPS/IDS, and layered firewall configuration over UniFi Controller Managed with the UniFi Network application: Version 5.14.11 and later Device Power cord DAC cable Rackmount ears
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 2 Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 30 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 286 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex-A57 CPU frequency [MHz] 1700 CPU cores 4
